caption:
Trying one of the best omakases in Japan! 
📍 @yoshi_matsunozushi , Tokyo

#sushi #japan #tokyo #omakase #tuna
transcript: supposedly down this alley is the best omakase in all of tokyo we're getting escorted into the house of the sushi chef oh my god this is a huge vibe you walk through the zen garden to get to the sushi counter the omakase spot is run by a fourth generation sushi master and it's 900 a seat yoshi what's up how long have you been making sushi for maybe 25 years this morning we went to the fish market with yoshi picked out all of our fish he came back and he prepared it for us okay that's the same part now we're gonna start cutting here this is the highest quality grade tuna you can get in japan this is one of the reasons i flew to japan was to try this man's sushi once we did melting in your mouth wow yoshi are you kidding me those were the best pieces of tuna i've ever had in my life sea urchin yoshi picked out at the fish market this morning at 7 a.m and then brought it back to his house oh toro uni hand roll oh my god that bite should be illegal during halftime of the omakase it's a traditional geisha dancing show all right loser has to take a shot of sagi okay thank you very much it looks amazing
